a.xlink:title: determine whether data has to be sent/received
merges send and receive data into one map (for parallel acceleration)
Exchanges data, if it has to be initialized.
Returns all data to be sent.
Returns all data to be received.
Checks whether any CouplingData in dataMap requires initialization.
Sends data sendDataIDs given in mapCouplingData with communication.
Receives data receiveDataIDs given in mapCouplingData with communication.
Used to set flag after data has been received using receiveData().
Set old coupling data values to current values.
Receive from coupling partner and return whether coupling scheme has converged.
Function to determine whether coupling scheme is an implicit coupling scheme.
